home.warnTitle: The audio mixer is not connected
home.warnDetail: Connect the mixer via USB before Sunday

update.downloaded: Version {v} ready — installs on next restart.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: All recordings from the last 6 months

schedule.title: Weekly schedule
schedule.subtitle: Fixed recordings that repeat automatically every week.
schedule.wakeDesc: Starts automatically a few minutes before the recording begins
schedule.wakeStatusPermission: Missing permission — click Schedule and approve
schedule.macStep2: Paste this command and press Enter:
schedule.macStep3: This prevents your Mac from fully powering off after sleep. Enter admin password when prompted.
schedule.winStep2: Click Change plan settings → Change advanced power settings
schedule.winStep4: Or: open PowerShell as administrator and run:
schedule.winStep5: This disables hibernate and keeps normal sleep (S3) which can always be woken.
schedule.protectTitle: Protect ongoing recordings from accidental stop
schedule.protectDesc: Requires confirmation to stop an ongoing recording
schedule.silenceDesc: Ends the recording if audio is silent for more than 5 minutes
schedule.splitDesc: Creates a new audio file every hour — easier to edit afterwards
schedule.errTimes: Start time must be before end time.

calendar.title: Church Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Schedule recordings for special days like Christmas Eve, Easter and other holidays.
calendar.autofillDesc: The app knows the Norwegian church calendar and can suggest names and dates automatically.
calendar.newSpecialSub: Schedule a single recording for a specific date.
calendar.name: NAME (suggestion from church calendar)
calendar.errNoDate: Select a date in the calendar.
calendar.hintShort: Click on a day to add a recording

audio.title: Audio Source
audio.subtitle: Select the USB mixer to use for recording
audio.sampleRateHint: 48,000 Hz is standard for video and church audio
audio.testDesc: Listen to the selected source in real time through your speakers.
audio.inputChannelsDesc: Select which channels from the audio interface to use for recording. Useful for multi-channel mixers (X32, SQ, TF, etc.).
audio.channelHint: Tip: to record mono from one channel, select the same channel for L and R, then set Channels to Mono below.
audio.compatDesc: USB mixers work on Mac without extra drivers. On Windows, the manufacturer's driver is recommended for multi-channel access. ASIO mode does not work — use WDM/WASAPI.
audio.compatAsio: Windows: ASIO mode is not accessible via browser API. Select WDM or WASAPI in the driver settings.

files.title: Files & Format
files.subtitle: Choose where and how recordings are saved
files.smartNameDesc: The app recognises church holidays and uses the correct name automatically.
files.autoDeleteDesc: Automatically frees disk space by deleting old recordings

general.title: General
general.langDetected: Detected from operating system: English. You can change this below.
general.langHint: The change takes effect after you press Save.
general.emailErrorDesc: Sends an email to the responsible person if recording fails
general.autoStartDesc: Runs quietly in the background — no action needed
general.showOnStartupDesc: Opens the window automatically when the app starts. Otherwise starts discreetly in the system tray.
general.upToDate: You are using the latest version:
general.autoUpdateDesc: Downloads and installs new versions quietly in the background

manual.title: Start manual recording
manual.subtitle: The recording starts immediately and you stop it yourself when finished.

recording.confirmBody: The recording will be saved up to this point.
recording.disconnected: Audio source was disconnected during recording

wizard.q1: Which audio mixer do you use?
wizard.q1sub: Select the device connected via USB.
wizard.q2sub: The app starts the recording automatically without anyone needing to do anything.
wizard.q3sub: Choose a folder that is easy to find.
wizard.usbHint: Connect the USB mixer if it does not appear here
